seoTitle: Terreel vs Terrey Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Terreel and Terrey Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Terreel vs Terrey Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Terreel and Terrey Hills.
heading: Terreel vs Terrey Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Terreel, New South Wales and Terrey Hills, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Terreel has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Terrey Hills (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Terreel or Terrey Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Terreel has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Terrey Hills scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Terreel scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Terrey Hills scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Terreel or Terrey Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Terreel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
